query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing a bird in flight over a body of water. The bird is captured mid-flight with wings spread, positioned in the center-right of the frame. The water below shows horizontal striations and gentle tonal gradations from light gray at the horizon to darker shades toward the bottom of the frame. The image is entirely monochromatic.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred black and white photograph of a bird in flight over water, where the subject and background dissolve into soft, smeared streaks. The bird's form is ghosted and repeated along its wing beats, lacking any sharp feather detail. The water surface renders as abstract horizontal bands of grainy gray tones, with the overall image approaching near-total abstraction where figure and ground merge into indistinct atmospheric haze.
